meaning: n.事先查看,[计]预览vt.事先查看,预展,预演
examples: He had gone to see the preview of a play.
Did you preview before the class?
You shall work in pairs or groups to show the preview results.
We've got a sneak preview of Middle Cyclone on this edition of All Songs Considered.
Engineer Peter Fell, one of the guests invited for the preview day, certainly thought so.
